overall.description: Third-person exploration of the Louvre Museum courtyard rendered in a game engine, featuring a character walking across the stone plaza from the Richelieu wing toward the iconic glass pyramids under a bright partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: Cour Carrée stone courtyard facing the Richelieu wing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the empty stone courtyard toward the ornate historic palace facade

entered.detail: historic stone palace facade with tall arched windows and ornate roofline
elaborately decorated central pavilion with sculptural roof details and dormer windows
vast stone tile courtyard pavement extending toward the palace

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the empty stone courtyard of the Louvre's Cour Carrée toward the imposing Richelieu wing with its classical stone facade and ornate central pavilion. The scene is bathed in bright midday sunlight with scattered clouds overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: Cour Napoléon with glass pyramids and Sully wing

events.description: character stops forward movement and pivots right to face the glass pyramids
iconic glass pyramids come into full view as the camera completes the turn

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking toward the famous glass pyramid structures in the main courtyard

entered.detail: large glass and metal pyramid structure reflecting the sky
smaller glass pyramid to the left of the main pyramid
historic stone building wing with classical architecture and arched windows

segments.scene_description: The character turns right to reveal the iconic Louvre glass pyramids, then walks toward them across the open plaza. The historic Sully wing lines the right side of the frame while the modern glass structures dominate the center, creating a striking contrast between contemporary and classical architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across the Louvre's stone courtyard, transitioning from a focus on classical facades to the modern glass pyramids. It begins with a character walking across the empty Cour Carrée toward the imposing Richelieu wing and its ornate central pavilion under a bright midday sky. As the character turns right, the perspective shifts to reveal the iconic glass pyramids emerging in the center of the open plaza. The scene then expands to showcase the historic Sully wing lining the right side of the frame, creating a striking visual contrast between the contemporary glass structures and the surrounding classical architecture.
